title: Timothy S. Maddocks
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Timothy S. Maddocks''' wrote the story of [[Janus Greejatus/Legends|Janus Greejatus]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace: The Official ''Star Wars'' Fan Club]].

He was known as "vader_of_bast" on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards]]. His alias is [http://boards.theforce.net/members/the_four_dot_elipsis.1167190 The_Four_Dot_Elipsis] on [[TheForce.net]], and he is also a former administrator on [[Wookieepedia]], where he is known as {{Srlink|User:Thefourdotelipsis|Thefourdotelipsis}}.

===Works===
